Nerox Music

Official Nerox Music F-Droid repository. Add this URL in the F-Droid app to receive updates automatically.

Currently it serves 1 apps. To add it to your F-Droid app, scan the QR code (click it to enlarge) or use this link:

https://tanmayy91.github.io/nerox-music/fdroid/repo

If you would like to manually verify the fingerprint (SHA-256) of the repository signing key, here it is:
3C B9 D1 85 ED 21 7D 72 E5 77 71 A5 2B 9D FB 83 6F 33 5B A7 D3 71 80 A8 88 C7 B4 FA 19 56 FC 14
